items.title: S01E01 - Funny Money
items.summary: Cable & Cash go after a banker involved in a counterfeit scheme using the funny money to bolster his own accounts.

infolabels.title: Funny Money
infolabels.plot: Cable & Cash go after a banker involved in a counterfeit scheme using the funny money to bolster his own accounts.

items.title: S01E02 - Crazy Cats
items.summary: When Bristol, a wealthy rancher, steals a valuable jade cat from the Chinese government, Cable goes undercover as a reporter to recover it before the Chinese go to war against the U.S.

infolabels.title: Crazy Cats
infolabels.plot: When Bristol, a wealthy rancher, steals a valuable jade cat from the Chinese government, Cable goes undercover as a reporter to recover it before the Chinese go to war against the U.S.

items.title: S01E03 - Jesse Who?
items.summary: Cable investigates when famed outlaw Jesse James is reported to have robbed a small-town California bank.

infolabels.title: Jesse Who?
infolabels.plot: Cable investigates when famed outlaw Jesse James is reported to have robbed a small-town California bank.

items.title: S01E04 - The Ballad of Redwing Jail
items.summary: Cable poses as an outlaw to recover $20,000 hidden in a small town jail by a corrupt sheriff, Hyde.

infolabels.title: The Ballad of Redwing Jail
infolabels.plot: Cable poses as an outlaw to recover $20,000 hidden in a small town jail by a corrupt sheriff, Hyde.

items.title: S01E05 - Guns For a Queen
items.summary: As they try to recover stolen rifles from revolutionaries, Cash and Cable both have to deal with women out of their past who have plans of their own.

infolabels.title: Guns For a Queen
infolabels.plot: As they try to recover stolen rifles from revolutionaries, Cash and Cable both have to deal with women out of their past who have plans of their own.

items.title: S01E06 - Irish Luck
items.summary: Assassins plan the death of Irish leader Charles Stewart Parnell and Cash & Cable must stop them.

infolabels.title: Irish Luck
infolabels.plot: Assassins plan the death of Irish leader Charles Stewart Parnell and Cash & Cable must stop them.

items.title: S01E07 - Sauce For the Goose
items.summary: Cable and Cash set up a seance as a scam to get their hands on corrupt civic leader Austin Benedict's list of payoffs.

infolabels.title: Sauce For the Goose
infolabels.plot: Cable and Cash set up a seance as a scam to get their hands on corrupt civic leader Austin Benedict's list of payoffs.

items.title: S01E08 - An Iron-Clad Plan
items.summary: Cable must pose as a foreign agent to reacquire the stolen plans for a new experimental iron-clad submarine.

infolabels.title: An Iron-Clad Plan
infolabels.plot: Cable must pose as a foreign agent to reacquire the stolen plans for a new experimental iron-clad submarine.

items.title: S01E09 - Arson and Old Lace
items.summary: Cable and Cash must uncover the identity of ""The Shark,"" a waterfront racketeer who burns fishermen's boats if they don't pay him protection money.

infolabels.title: Arson and Old Lace
infolabels.plot: Cable and Cash must uncover the identity of ""The Shark,"" a waterfront racketeer who burns fishermen's boats if they don't pay him protection money.

items.title: S01E10 - Sharks Eat Sharks
items.summary: When Cash and Cable need to take out two groups of crooks - one of con men and one of shakedown extortion artists - they set up a phony diamond mine to play both groups off of each other.

infolabels.title: Sharks Eat Sharks
infolabels.plot: When Cash and Cable need to take out two groups of crooks - one of con men and one of shakedown extortion artists - they set up a phony diamond mine to play both groups off of each other.

items.title: S01E11 - The Day Cable Was Hanged
items.summary: Cable ends up arresting a man who he believes is John Wilkes Booth.

infolabels.title: The Day Cable Was Hanged
infolabels.plot: Cable ends up arresting a man who he believes is John Wilkes Booth.

items.title: S01E12 - Mary Had More Than a Little
items.summary: Cash is attracted to a new lady dealer at a rival casino, Mary Ellen, but she's involved in criminal doings when the gamblers who win at her table get robbed by thieves as they leave the place.

infolabels.title: Mary Had More Than a Little
infolabels.plot: Cash is attracted to a new lady dealer at a rival casino, Mary Ellen, but she's involved in criminal doings when the gamblers who win at her table get robbed by thieves as they leave the place.

items.title: S01E13 - The Dawson Marker
items.summary: The heirs of Confederate agents who stole and hid a shipment of gold during the Civil War are meeting in San Francisco to recover the loot, but Cable hopes to get the cache first.

infolabels.title: The Dawson Marker
infolabels.plot: The heirs of Confederate agents who stole and hid a shipment of gold during the Civil War are meeting in San Francisco to recover the loot, but Cable hopes to get the cache first.
